attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT 
	SNAPSHOT_DATE AS SNAPSHOT_DATE, 
	PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, 
	MAX(X_ACTIVE_FLG) AS X_ACTIVE_FLG, 
	MAX(X_NEW_HIRE_FLG) AS X_NEW_HIRE_FLG, 
	MAX(X_TERMINATED_FLG) AS X_TERMINATED_FLG, 
	MAX(X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT) AS X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT, 
	COUNT(*) AS COUNT_UPD
FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS  
GROUP BY SNAPSHOT_DATE, PERSON_ID
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

ports.expression:
IIF(TO_INTEGER(CURR_X_GRD_VALUE)= TO_INTEGER(PREV_X_GRD_VALUE),'Global Grade Lateral', 
IIF(TO_INTEGER(CURR_X_GRD_VALUE ) >TO_INTEGER( PREV_X_GRD_VALUE),'Global Grade Increase',
 IIF(TO_INTEGER(CURR_X_GRD_VALUE) < TO_INTEGER(PREV_X_GRD_VALUE),'Global Grade Decrease',
IIF(ISNULL(CURR_X_GRD_VALUE) OR PAY_GRADE_WID=0,'Unspecified',IIF(ISNULL(PREV_X_GRD_VALUE) OR PREV_GRADE_WID='0','Unspecified')
))))

attributes.Lookup condition: BASE_POSTN_ID = in_POSTN_DH_BASE_EMP_ID AND EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT <= in_date AND EFFECTIVE_TO_DT > in_date

ports.expression:
UPPER(IIF(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'MM') = '10', CONCAT(CONCAT(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'MON'),'-FY'),TO_CHAR(ADD_TO_DATE(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYY',1),'YYYY')), 
IIF(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'MM') = '11', CONCAT(CONCAT(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'MON'),'-FY'),TO_CHAR(ADD_TO_DATE(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYY',1),'YYYY')),
IIF(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'MM') = '12', CONCAT(CONCAT(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'MON'),'-FY'),TO_CHAR(ADD_TO_DATE(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYY',1),'YYYY')),
CONCAT(CONCAT(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'MON'),'-FY'),TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYY'))))))

IIF(ISNULL(DATE_OF_BIRTH) OR DATE_OF_BIRTH > SNAPSHOT_DATE, -2,
FLOOR(DATE_DIFF(SNAPSHOT_DATE, DATE_OF_BIRTH, 'MM')))

IIF(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'YYYYMM') > '201903' AND X_ECR_FLAG = 'Y', FALSE, 
IIF(TRANS_TYPE='ACTIVE' AND COUNT_UPD= 2 AND TO_CHAR(X_ACTIVE_FLG_UPD)||TO_CHAR(X_NEW_HIRE_FLG_UPD)||TO_CHAR(X_TERMINATED_FLG_UPD)='101', FALSE,
TRUE))

--IIF(TRANS_TYPE='TERMINATION',TRUE,
--IIF(TRANS_TYPE='ACTIVE' AND COUNT_UPD=1,TRUE,
--IIF(TRANS_TYPE='ACTIVE' AND COUNT_UPD= 2 AND TO_CHAR(X_ACTIVE_FLG_UPD)||TO_CHAR(X_NEW_HIRE_FLG_UPD)||TO_CHAR(X_TERMINATED_FLG_UPD)='111', TRUE,FALSE)))

IIF(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'YYYYMM') >= '201903' AND X_ECR_FLAG = 'Y' , 0,
IIF(TRANS_TYPE='ACTIVE' AND SNAPSHOT_DATE = X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT, 0, X_ACTIVE_FLG))

--IIF(COUNT_UPD=2,IIF(X_ACTIVE_FLG=1 AND X_TERMINATED_FLG=1, 0,X_ACTIVE_FLG),X_ACTIVE_FLG)
IIF(TO_CHAR(SNAPSHOT_DATE, 'YYYYMM') >= '201903' AND X_ECR_FLAG = 'Y' , 1,IIF(TRANS_TYPE='TERMINATION' AND EMP_X_EMP_HIRE_DT = EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT, 0, X_TERMINATED_FLG))

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  FACT_STAGE.ASSIGNMENT_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  FACT_STAGE.PERSON_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  FACT_STAGE.INTEGRATION_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.W_INSERT_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.W_UPDATE_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  FACT_STAGE.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  FACT_STAGE.X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.LOCATION_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.HR_ORG_WID as ORG_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.JOB_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.PAY_GRADE_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  FACT_STAGE.POW_START_DT ,
  FACT_STAGE.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  FACT_STAGE.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  FACT_STAGE.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  FACT_STAGE.LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  FACT_STAGE.FTE ,
  FACT_STAGE.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  FACT_STAGE.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  FACT_STAGE.NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  FACT_STAGE.SALARY_ANNL ,
  FACT_STAGE.SALARY_MONTH ,
  FACT_STAGE.SALARY_HOUR ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE,
  FACT_STAGE.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  FACT_STAGE.EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  FACT_STAGE.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_CHANGE_DATE,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  FACT_STAGE.X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE as NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE,
  FACT_STAGE.X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_REVIEW_TYPE,
  FACT_STAGE.X_GRADE_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.TRANS_TYPE,
  FACT_STAGE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_GRE_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  NULL as X_ACTIVE_FLG_UPD,
  NULL as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG_UPD,
  NULL as X_TERMINATED_FLG_UPD,
  NULL as COUNT_UPD,
  NULL as X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  nvl(to_number(to_char(fact_stage.X_CHANGE_DATE,'yyyymmdd')), 0)-lag(nvl(to_number(to_char(fact_stage.X_CHANGE_DATE,'yyyymmdd')), 0),1,0)over(order by FACT_STAGE.person_id,FACT_STAGE.snapshot_date,FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYEE_WID) as CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FACT_STAGE.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FACT_STAGE.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FACT_STAGE.RATING,
  FACT_STAGE.CURR_JOB_ID ,
  case when FACT_STAGE.PREV_JOB_ID is null then lag(FACT_STAGE.CURR_JOB_ID,1) over (order by FACT_STAGE.person_id,FACT_STAGE.snapshot_date,FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYEE_WID) else FACT_STAGE.PREV_JOB_ID end PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FACT_STAGE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FACT_STAGE.CURR_GRADE_ID,
  CASE WHEN FACT_STAGE.PREV_GRADE_ID is null then lag(FACT_STAGE.CURR_GRADE_ID,1) over (order by FACT_STAGE.person_id, FACT_STAGE.snapshot_date,FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYEE_WID) else FACT_STAGE.PREV_GRADE_ID end PREV_GRADE_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO
  ,CASE WHEN X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO=0 THEN 'No Data' 
   WHEN FACT_STAGE.SALARY_ANNL < FACT_STAGE.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT THEN 'Below MIN'
  WHEN FACT_STAGE.SALARY_ANNL > FACT_STAGE.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT THEN 'Above MAX'
  when X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO <0.9 then 'MIN - 0.9'
  when X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO >1.1 then '1.1 - MAX' else '0.9 - 1.1' end as X_FTE_Compa_Ratio_Zone
 FROM 
(SELECT 
qn1.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Active Flow
  qn1.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  qn1.PERSON_ID,
  qn1.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  qn1.INTEGRATION_ID,
  qn1.W_INSERT_DT,
  qn1.W_UPDATE_DT,
  qn1.X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  qn1.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  qn1.X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  qn1.EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  qn1.LOCATION_WID,
  qn1.HR_ORG_WID,
  qn1.EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn1.HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  qn1.JOB_WID,
  qn1.PAY_GRADE_WID,
  qn1.SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  qn1.POW_START_DT ,
  qn1.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn1.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn1.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn1.LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  qn1.FTE ,
  qn1.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  qn1.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  qn1.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  qn1.SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  qn1.NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  qn1.SALARY_ANNL ,
  qn1.SALARY_MONTH ,
  qn1.SALARY_HOUR ,
  qn1.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  qn1.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  qn1.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  qn1.X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn1.X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn1.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  qn1.EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  qn1.MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  qn1.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  qn1.X_CHANGE_DATE,
  qn1.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  qn1.X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn1.X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn1.X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  qn1.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  qn1.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  qn1.X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  qn1.X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  qn1.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  qn1.X_REVIEW_TYPE,
  qn1.X_GRADE_ID,
  qn1.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  qn1.TRANS_TYPE,
  qn1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  qn1.EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  qn1.X_GRE_WID,
  qn1.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  qn1.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn1.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn1.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  qn1.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  qn1.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  qn1.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  qn1.RATING,
  qn1.CURR_JOB_ID,
  qn1.PREV_JOB_ID ,
  qn1.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  qn1.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  qn1.X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  qn1.EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  qn1.X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  qn1.X_ECR_FLAG,
  qn1.CURR_GRADE_ID,
  qn1.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  qn1.PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,qn1.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,qn1.X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
  ,qn1.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE
,qn1.X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL
,qn1.X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO
,qn1.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT
,qn1.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 
FROM 
(SELECT  /*+ ORDERED USE_NL(emp_postn)  parallel(24)*/
FS.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Active Flow
  FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  FS.PERSON_ID,
  FS.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  FS.INTEGRATION_ID,
  FS.W_INSERT_DT,
  FS.W_UPDATE_DT,
  FS.X_ACTIVE_FLG as X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  FS.X_TERMINATED_FLG as X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  CASE
    WHEN EMPL.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE EMPL.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  LOC.ROW_WID as LOCATION_WID,
  ORG.ORG_WID AS HR_ORG_WID,
  CASE
  WHEN EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
  THEN 0
  ELSE EMP.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYEE_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN BUS.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE BUS.ROW_WID
  END as HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  JOB.ROW_WID as JOB_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN GRD.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE GRD.ROW_WID
  END PAY_GRADE_WID,
  SUP.ROW_WID AS SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  FS.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE as POW_START_DT ,
  FS.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.PPP_LAST_CHANGE_DATE as LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  FS.FTE ,
  FS.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FS.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  FS.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  CASE
    WHEN SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID IS NOT NULL
    THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END as SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  FS.DFLT_RATING_PCT as NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  FS.SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.SALARY_MONTH ,
  FS.SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.REVIEW_DATE as X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  CASE
	WHEN EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID
  END as EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  CASE 
   WHEN FS.MANAGER_FLAG = 'Y' 
   THEN 1
   ELSE 0
  END as MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  FS.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FS.PPP_CHANGE_DATE as X_CHANGE_DATE,
  FS.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  FS.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  CASE
	WHEN CURR_EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE CURR_EMP.ROW_WID
  END as X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE4 as X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  HRA.ROW_WID as X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  SUP_ORG.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  SUP_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  SUP_JOB.ROW_WID      AS X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  SUP_BUS.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FS.X_REVIEW_TYPE,
  FS.X_GRADE_ID,
  FS.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FS.TRANS_TYPE,
  FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  CASE
	WHEN EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID
  END as EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  CASE
	WHEN GRE.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE GRE.ROW_WID
  END X_GRE_WID,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  WORK_LOC.ROW_WID AS X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  SUP_WORK_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FS.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  FS.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FS.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FS.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FS.RATING,
  FS.JOB_ID as CURR_JOB_ID,
  FS.PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  EMP.EMP_HIRE_DT AS X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  EMP.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT AS EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  BU_ORG.ROW_WID AS X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FS.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FS.GRADE_ID as CURR_GRADE_ID,
  FS.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  NVL(PB.ROW_WID,0) PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FS.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fs.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1) X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fS.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1)  X_GLOBAL2_XRATE  
,CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr END 
 END  as X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL 

,CASE WHEN nvl(GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr
     END
END / GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT END as X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO 
	
,nvl(GRD.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,nvl(GRD.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 
		  
FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS FS

  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D SUP
  ON FS.SUPERVISOR_ID                =SUP.INTEGRATION_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SUP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE <= SUP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND SUP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D LOC
  ON LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.LOCATION_ID
  AND LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D JOB
  ON JOB.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.JOB_ID
  AND JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_HR_ASSIGNMENT_D HRA
  ON HRA.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
  AND HRA.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_DH ORG
  ON ORG.ORGANIZATION_ID              = FS.ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND ORG.HIERARCHY_NAME='JEG Org Hierarchy (Functional)'
   AND FS.snapshot_date >= ORG.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < ORG.effective_to_dt

  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_ORG
  ON SUP_ORG.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_ID
   AND SUP_ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_LOCATION
  ON SUP_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D SUP_JOB
  ON SUP_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID            = FS.X_JOB_ID
  AND SUP_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_BUS
  ON SUP_BUS.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND SUP_BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /* New Inclusions*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D EMP
  ON EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE     >= EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE     <= EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND EMP. DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYMENT_D EMPL
  ON EMPL.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYMENT_ID
  AND EMPL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D BUS
  ON BUS.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PAY_GRADE_D GRD
  ON GRD.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.X_PAY_GRADE_ID
  AND GRD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= GRD.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< GRD.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT,EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D WHERE CURRENT_FLG='Y') CURR_EMP
  ON CURR_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND CURR_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_POSITION_DH EMP_POSTN
  ON EMP_POSTN.BASE_EMP_ID     = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND EMP_POSTN.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, SUPERVISOR_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ACTIVE_FLG=1) SUP_IND
  ON SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND SUP_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  AND SUP_IND.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WRKFC_EVENT_TYPE_D EVT_RSN_TYP
  ON EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_REASON_CODE = FS.LEAVING_REASON
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_TYPE_CODE = 'TERM'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE='GRELEG'
  UNION
  SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE IS NULL) GRE
  ON GRE.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_GRE_ID
  AND GRE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.snapshot_date >= GRE.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < GRE.effective_to_dt

  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D WORK_LOC
  ON WORK_LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND WORK_LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_WORK_LOCATION
  ON SUP_WORK_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_WORK_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_BU_ORG_DH BU_ORG
  ON BU_ORG.PU     = FS.PU
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, PERSON_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ECR_FLAG = 'Y' and to_char(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYYMM') <= '201902') ECR_IND
  ON ECR_IND.PERSON_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND ECR_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_PAY_BASIS_D PB
  ON FS.PAY_BASIS_ID = PB.PAY_BASIS_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID


WHERE 
FS.TRANS_TYPE = 'ACTIVE' 

--AND to_char(FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,'yyyymmdd') IN ('~DATE~')
order by person_id)qn1

UNION ALL

-- Terminated Employees

SELECT qn.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Termination Flow
  qn.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  qn.PERSON_ID,
  qn.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  qn.INTEGRATION_ID,
  qn.W_INSERT_DT,
  qn.W_UPDATE_DT,
  qn.X_ACTIVE_FLG as X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  qn.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  qn.X_TERMINATED_FLG as X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  qn.EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  qn.LOCATION_WID,
  qn.HR_ORG_WID,
  qn.EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn.HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  qn.JOB_WID,
  qn.PAY_GRADE_WID,
  qn.SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  qn.POW_START_DT ,
  qn.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn.LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  qn.FTE ,
  qn.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  qn.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  qn.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
 qn.SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  qn.NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  qn.SALARY_ANNL ,
  qn.SALARY_MONTH ,
  qn.SALARY_HOUR ,
  qn.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  qn.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  qn.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  qn.X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn.X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
 qn.EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
 qn.MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  qn.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  qn.X_CHANGE_DATE,
  qn.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  qn.X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
 qn.X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn.X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  qn.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  qn.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  qn.X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  qn.X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  qn.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  qn.X_REVIEW_TYPE, 
  qn.X_GRADE_ID,
  qn.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  qn.TRANS_TYPE,
  qn.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  qn.EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  qn.X_GRE_WID,
  qn.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  qn.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  qn.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  qn.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  qn.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  qn.RATING,
  qn.CURR_JOB_ID,
  qn.PREV_JOB_ID ,
  qn.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  qn.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  qn.X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  qn.EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  qn.X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  qn.X_ECR_FLAG,
  qn.CURR_GRADE_ID,
  qn.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  qn.PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,qn.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,qn.X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
  ,qn.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE
,qn.X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL
,qn.X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO
,qn.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,qn.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 

  FROM

(SELECT /*+ ORDERED USE_NL(emp_postn)  parallel(24)*/
FS.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Termination Flow
  FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  FS.PERSON_ID,
  FS.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  FS.INTEGRATION_ID,
  FS.W_INSERT_DT,
  FS.W_UPDATE_DT,
  FS.X_ACTIVE_FLG as X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  FS.X_TERMINATED_FLG as X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  CASE
    WHEN EMPL.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE EMPL.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  LOC.ROW_WID as LOCATION_WID,
  ORG.ORG_WID AS HR_ORG_WID,
  CASE
  WHEN EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
  THEN 0
  ELSE EMP.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYEE_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN BUS.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE BUS.ROW_WID
  END as HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  JOB.ROW_WID as JOB_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN GRD.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE GRD.ROW_WID
  END PAY_GRADE_WID,
  SUP.ROW_WID AS SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  FS.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE as POW_START_DT ,
  FS.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.PPP_LAST_CHANGE_DATE as LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  FS.FTE ,
  FS.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FS.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  FS.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  /*CASE
    WHEN SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID IS NOT NULL
    THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END*/ 0 as SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  FS.DFLT_RATING_PCT as NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  FS.SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.SALARY_MONTH ,
  FS.SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.REVIEW_DATE as X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  CASE
	WHEN EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID
  END as EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  CASE 
   WHEN FS.MANAGER_FLAG = 'Y' 
   THEN 1
   ELSE 0
  END as MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  FS.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FS.PPP_CHANGE_DATE as X_CHANGE_DATE,
  FS.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  FS.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  CASE
	WHEN CURR_EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE CURR_EMP.ROW_WID
  END as X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE4 as X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  HRA.ROW_WID as X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  SUP_ORG.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  SUP_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  SUP_JOB.ROW_WID      AS X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  SUP_BUS.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FS.X_REVIEW_TYPE, 
  FS.X_GRADE_ID,
  FS.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FS.TRANS_TYPE,
  FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  CASE
	WHEN EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID
  END as EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  CASE
	WHEN GRE.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE GRE.ROW_WID
  END X_GRE_WID,
  NULL as X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  WORK_LOC.ROW_WID AS X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  SUP_WORK_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FS.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  FS.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FS.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FS.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FS.RATING,
  FS.JOB_ID as CURR_JOB_ID,
  FS.PREV_JOB_ID as PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  EMP.EMP_HIRE_DT AS X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  EMP.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT AS          EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  BU_ORG.ROW_WID AS X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FS.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FS.GRADE_ID as CURR_GRADE_ID,
  FS.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  NVL(PB.ROW_WID, 0) PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FS.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fs.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1) X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fS.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1)  X_GLOBAL2_XRATE               
,CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr END 
 END  as X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL 
	   
,CASE WHEN nvl(GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr
     END
END / GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT END as X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO 

,nvl(GRD.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,nvl(GRD.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 		  
FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS FS

  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D SUP
  ON FS.SUPERVISOR_ID                =SUP.INTEGRATION_ID
  AND SUP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 <= SUP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND SUP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D LOC
  ON LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.LOCATION_ID
  AND LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D JOB
  ON JOB.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.JOB_ID
  AND JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_HR_ASSIGNMENT_D HRA
  ON HRA.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
  AND HRA.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_DH ORG
  ON ORG.ORGANIZATION_ID            = FS.ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND ORG.HIERARCHY_NAME='JEG Org Hierarchy (Functional)'
     AND FS.snapshot_date >= ORG.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < ORG.effective_to_dt
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_ORG
  ON SUP_ORG.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND SUP_ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_LOCATION
  ON SUP_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_LOCATION_ID
   AND SUP_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D SUP_JOB
  ON SUP_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID            = FS.X_JOB_ID
  AND SUP_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_BUS
  ON SUP_BUS.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND SUP_BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /* New Inclusions*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D EMP
  ON EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1     >= EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1     <= EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND EMP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYMENT_D EMPL
  ON EMPL.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYMENT_ID
  AND EMPL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D BUS
  ON BUS.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	>= BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	< BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PAY_GRADE_D GRD
  ON GRD.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.X_PAY_GRADE_ID
  AND GRD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	>= GRD.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	< GRD.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT,EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D WHERE CURRENT_FLG='Y') CURR_EMP
  ON CURR_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND CURR_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_POSITION_DH EMP_POSTN
  ON EMP_POSTN.BASE_EMP_ID     = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND EMP_POSTN.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT	>= EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT	< EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, SUPERVISOR_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ACTIVE_FLG=1) SUP_IND
  ON SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND SUP_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE*/
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WRKFC_EVENT_TYPE_D EVT_RSN_TYP
  ON EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_REASON_CODE = FS.LEAVING_REASON
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_TYPE_CODE = 'TERM'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE='GRELEG'
  UNION
  SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE IS NULL) GRE
  ON GRE.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_GRE_ID
  AND GRE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.snapshot_date >= GRE.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < GRE.effective_to_dt

  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D WORK_LOC
  ON WORK_LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND WORK_LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_WORK_LOCATION
  ON SUP_WORK_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_WORK_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_BU_ORG_DH BU_ORG
  ON BU_ORG.PU     = FS.PU
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, PERSON_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ECR_FLAG= 'Y' and to_char(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYYMM') <= '201903') ECR_IND
  ON ECR_IND.PERSON_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND ECR_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_PAY_BASIS_D PB
  ON FS.PAY_BASIS_ID = PB.PAY_BASIS_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  

WHERE 
FS.TRANS_TYPE = 'TERMINATION' 
--AND to_char(FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,'yyyymmdd') IN ('~DATE~')
order by person_id)qn 

) FACT_STAGE
WHERE FACT_STAGE.PERSON_ID <> '2731000'

  qn1.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,

  ,qn1.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,qn1.X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
  ,qn1.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE
,qn1.X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL
,qn1.X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO
,qn1.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT
,qn1.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 
FROM 
(SELECT  /*+ ORDERED USE_NL(emp_postn)  parallel(24)*/
FS.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Active Flow
  FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  FS.PERSON_ID,
  FS.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  FS.INTEGRATION_ID,
  FS.W_INSERT_DT,
  FS.W_UPDATE_DT,
  FS.X_ACTIVE_FLG as X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  FS.X_TERMINATED_FLG as X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  CASE
    WHEN EMPL.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE EMPL.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  LOC.ROW_WID as LOCATION_WID,
  ORG.ORG_WID AS HR_ORG_WID,
  CASE
  WHEN EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
  THEN 0
  ELSE EMP.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYEE_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN BUS.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE BUS.ROW_WID
  END as HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  JOB.ROW_WID as JOB_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN GRD.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE GRD.ROW_WID
  END PAY_GRADE_WID,
  SUP.ROW_WID AS SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  FS.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE as POW_START_DT ,
  FS.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.PPP_LAST_CHANGE_DATE as LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  FS.FTE ,
  FS.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FS.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  FS.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  CASE
    WHEN SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID IS NOT NULL
    THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END as SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  FS.DFLT_RATING_PCT as NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  FS.SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.SALARY_MONTH ,
  FS.SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.REVIEW_DATE as X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  CASE
	WHEN EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID
  END as EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  CASE 
   WHEN FS.MANAGER_FLAG = 'Y' 
   THEN 1
   ELSE 0
  END as MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  FS.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FS.PPP_CHANGE_DATE as X_CHANGE_DATE,
  FS.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  FS.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  CASE
	WHEN CURR_EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE CURR_EMP.ROW_WID
  END as X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE4 as X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  HRA.ROW_WID as X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  SUP_ORG.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  SUP_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  SUP_JOB.ROW_WID      AS X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  SUP_BUS.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FS.X_REVIEW_TYPE,
  FS.X_GRADE_ID,
  FS.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FS.TRANS_TYPE,
  FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  CASE
	WHEN EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID
  END as EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  CASE
	WHEN GRE.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE GRE.ROW_WID
  END X_GRE_WID,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  WORK_LOC.ROW_WID AS X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  SUP_WORK_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FS.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  FS.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FS.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FS.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FS.RATING,
  FS.JOB_ID as CURR_JOB_ID,
  FS.PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  EMP.EMP_HIRE_DT AS X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  EMP.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT AS EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  BU_ORG.ROW_WID AS X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FS.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FS.GRADE_ID as CURR_GRADE_ID,
  FS.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  NVL(PB.ROW_WID,0) PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FS.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fs.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1) X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fS.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1)  X_GLOBAL2_XRATE  
,CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr END 
 END  as X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL 

,CASE WHEN nvl(GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr
     END
END / GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT END as X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO 
	
,nvl(GRD.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,nvl(GRD.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 
		  
FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS FS

  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D SUP
  ON FS.SUPERVISOR_ID                =SUP.INTEGRATION_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SUP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE <= SUP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND SUP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D LOC
  ON LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.LOCATION_ID
  AND LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D JOB
  ON JOB.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.JOB_ID
  AND JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_HR_ASSIGNMENT_D HRA
  ON HRA.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
  AND HRA.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_DH ORG
  ON ORG.ORGANIZATION_ID              = FS.ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND ORG.HIERARCHY_NAME='JEG Org Hierarchy (Functional)'
   AND FS.snapshot_date >= ORG.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < ORG.effective_to_dt

  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_ORG
  ON SUP_ORG.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_ID
   AND SUP_ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_LOCATION
  ON SUP_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D SUP_JOB
  ON SUP_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID            = FS.X_JOB_ID
  AND SUP_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_BUS
  ON SUP_BUS.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND SUP_BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /* New Inclusions*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D EMP
  ON EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE     >= EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE     <= EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND EMP. DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYMENT_D EMPL
  ON EMPL.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYMENT_ID
  AND EMPL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D BUS
  ON BUS.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PAY_GRADE_D GRD
  ON GRD.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.X_PAY_GRADE_ID
  AND GRD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= GRD.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< GRD.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT,EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D WHERE CURRENT_FLG='Y') CURR_EMP
  ON CURR_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND CURR_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_POSITION_DH EMP_POSTN
  ON EMP_POSTN.BASE_EMP_ID     = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND EMP_POSTN.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, SUPERVISOR_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ACTIVE_FLG=1) SUP_IND
  ON SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND SUP_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  AND SUP_IND.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WRKFC_EVENT_TYPE_D EVT_RSN_TYP
  ON EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_REASON_CODE = FS.LEAVING_REASON
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_TYPE_CODE = 'TERM'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE='GRELEG'
  UNION
  SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE IS NULL) GRE
  ON GRE.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_GRE_ID
  AND GRE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.snapshot_date >= GRE.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < GRE.effective_to_dt

  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D WORK_LOC
  ON WORK_LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND WORK_LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_WORK_LOCATION
  ON SUP_WORK_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_WORK_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_BU_ORG_DH BU_ORG
  ON BU_ORG.PU     = FS.PU
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, PERSON_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ECR_FLAG = 'Y' and to_char(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYYMM') <= '201902') ECR_IND
  ON ECR_IND.PERSON_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND ECR_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_PAY_BASIS_D PB
  ON FS.PAY_BASIS_ID = PB.PAY_BASIS_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID


WHERE 
FS.TRANS_TYPE = 'ACTIVE' 

--AND to_char(FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,'yyyymmdd') IN ('~DATE~')
order by person_id)qn1

UNION ALL

-- Terminated Employees

SELECT qn.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Termination Flow
  qn.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  qn.PERSON_ID,
  qn.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  qn.INTEGRATION_ID,
  qn.W_INSERT_DT,

  qn.HR_ORG_WID,
  qn.EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn.HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  qn.JOB_WID,
  qn.PAY_GRADE_WID,
  qn.SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  qn.POW_START_DT ,
  qn.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn.LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  qn.FTE ,

  qn.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  qn.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
 qn.SUPERVISOR_IND,

  qn.SALARY_HOUR ,

  qn.X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
 qn.EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
 qn.MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  qn.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  qn.X_CHANGE_DATE,
  qn.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  qn.X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
 qn.X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn.X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  qn.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  qn.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  qn.X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  qn.X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  qn.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  qn.X_REVIEW_TYPE, 
  qn.X_GRADE_ID,
  qn.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  qn.TRANS_TYPE,
  qn.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  qn.EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  qn.X_GRE_WID,
  qn.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  qn.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  qn.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  qn.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  qn.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  qn.RATING,
  qn.CURR_JOB_ID,
  qn.PREV_JOB_ID ,
  qn.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  qn.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  qn.X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  qn.EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  qn.X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  qn.X_ECR_FLAG,
  qn.CURR_GRADE_ID,
  qn.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  qn.PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,qn.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,qn.X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
  ,qn.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE
,qn.X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL
,qn.X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO
,qn.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,qn.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 

  FROM

(SELECT /*+ ORDERED USE_NL(emp_postn)  parallel(24)*/
FS.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Termination Flow
  FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  FS.PERSON_ID,
  FS.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  FS.INTEGRATION_ID,
  FS.W_INSERT_DT,
  FS.W_UPDATE_DT,
  FS.X_ACTIVE_FLG as X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  FS.X_TERMINATED_FLG as X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  CASE
    WHEN EMPL.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE EMPL.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  LOC.ROW_WID as LOCATION_WID,
  ORG.ORG_WID AS HR_ORG_WID,
  CASE
  WHEN EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
  THEN 0
  ELSE EMP.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYEE_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN BUS.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE BUS.ROW_WID
  END as HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  JOB.ROW_WID as JOB_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN GRD.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE GRD.ROW_WID
  END PAY_GRADE_WID,
  SUP.ROW_WID AS SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  FS.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE as POW_START_DT ,
  FS.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.PPP_LAST_CHANGE_DATE as LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  FS.FTE ,
  FS.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FS.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  FS.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  /*CASE
    WHEN SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID IS NOT NULL
    THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END*/ 0 as SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  FS.DFLT_RATING_PCT as NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  FS.SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.SALARY_MONTH ,
  FS.SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.REVIEW_DATE as X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  CASE
	WHEN EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID
  END as EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  CASE 
   WHEN FS.MANAGER_FLAG = 'Y' 
   THEN 1
   ELSE 0
  END as MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  FS.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FS.PPP_CHANGE_DATE as X_CHANGE_DATE,
  FS.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  FS.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  CASE
	WHEN CURR_EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE CURR_EMP.ROW_WID
  END as X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE4 as X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  HRA.ROW_WID as X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  SUP_ORG.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  SUP_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  SUP_JOB.ROW_WID      AS X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  SUP_BUS.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FS.X_REVIEW_TYPE, 
  FS.X_GRADE_ID,
  FS.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FS.TRANS_TYPE,
  FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  CASE
	WHEN EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID
  END as EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  CASE
	WHEN GRE.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE GRE.ROW_WID
  END X_GRE_WID,
  NULL as X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  WORK_LOC.ROW_WID AS X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  SUP_WORK_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FS.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  FS.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FS.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FS.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FS.RATING,
  FS.JOB_ID as CURR_JOB_ID,
  FS.PREV_JOB_ID as PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  EMP.EMP_HIRE_DT AS X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  EMP.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT AS          EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  BU_ORG.ROW_WID AS X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FS.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FS.GRADE_ID as CURR_GRADE_ID,
  FS.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  NVL(PB.ROW_WID, 0) PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FS.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fs.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1) X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fS.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1)  X_GLOBAL2_XRATE               
,CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr END 
 END  as X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL 
	   
,CASE WHEN nvl(GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr
     END
END / GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT END as X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO 

,nvl(GRD.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,nvl(GRD.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 		  
FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS FS

  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D SUP
  ON FS.SUPERVISOR_ID                =SUP.INTEGRATION_ID
  AND SUP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 <= SUP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND SUP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D LOC
  ON LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.LOCATION_ID
  AND LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D JOB
  ON JOB.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.JOB_ID
  AND JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_HR_ASSIGNMENT_D HRA
  ON HRA.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
  AND HRA.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_DH ORG
  ON ORG.ORGANIZATION_ID            = FS.ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND ORG.HIERARCHY_NAME='JEG Org Hierarchy (Functional)'
     AND FS.snapshot_date >= ORG.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < ORG.effective_to_dt
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_ORG
  ON SUP_ORG.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND SUP_ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_LOCATION
  ON SUP_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_LOCATION_ID
   AND SUP_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D SUP_JOB
  ON SUP_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID            = FS.X_JOB_ID
  AND SUP_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_BUS
  ON SUP_BUS.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND SUP_BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /* New Inclusions*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D EMP
  ON EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1     >= EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1     <= EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND EMP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYMENT_D EMPL
  ON EMPL.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYMENT_ID
  AND EMPL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D BUS
  ON BUS.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	>= BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	< BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PAY_GRADE_D GRD
  ON GRD.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.X_PAY_GRADE_ID
  AND GRD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	>= GRD.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	< GRD.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT,EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D WHERE CURRENT_FLG='Y') CURR_EMP
  ON CURR_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND CURR_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_POSITION_DH EMP_POSTN
  ON EMP_POSTN.BASE_EMP_ID     = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND EMP_POSTN.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT	>= EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT	< EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, SUPERVISOR_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ACTIVE_FLG=1) SUP_IND
  ON SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND SUP_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE*/
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WRKFC_EVENT_TYPE_D EVT_RSN_TYP
  ON EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_REASON_CODE = FS.LEAVING_REASON
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_TYPE_CODE = 'TERM'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE='GRELEG'
  UNION
  SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE IS NULL) GRE
  ON GRE.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_GRE_ID
  AND GRE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.snapshot_date >= GRE.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < GRE.effective_to_dt

  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D WORK_LOC
  ON WORK_LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND WORK_LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_WORK_LOCATION
  ON SUP_WORK_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_WORK_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_BU_ORG_DH BU_ORG
  ON BU_ORG.PU     = FS.PU
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, PERSON_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ECR_FLAG= 'Y' and to_char(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYYMM') <= '201903') ECR_IND
  ON ECR_IND.PERSON_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND ECR_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_PAY_BASIS_D PB
  ON FS.PAY_BASIS_ID = PB.PAY_BASIS_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  

WHERE 
FS.TRANS_TYPE = 'TERMINATION' 
--AND to_char(FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,'yyyymmdd') IN ('~DATE~')
order by person_id)qn 

) FACT_STAGE
WHERE FACT_STAGE.PERSON_ID <> '2731000'
